Off Calendar Apr-12-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Nicholas A. Arcamone, Esq. of Clark Hill, LLP, T:619.557.0404, for defendant/moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT WCP II, LLC's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint, as follows:

CCP 426.50 requires grant of a motion to file a cross-complaint "at any time," and the statute states that it "shall be liberally construed." I do not find the delay here to have been in bad faith. WCP II, LLC's motion is thus GRANTED. Plaintiff's opposition does not state a need for the trial to be continued, but WCP states its willingness to so stipulate. Any trial continuance is to be sought by motion in Department 206.

ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
